reapack.name: Rea-Sixty
reapack.desc: SSL UF8/UC1 native control surface for REAPER

metadata.description:
REAPER extension that drives the SSL UF8 and UC1 control surfaces natively over their vendor-USB protocol. Replaces SSL 360° without requiring an SSL plug-in on every track. Track colours on UF8 scribble strips, four SSL plug-in families plus FX-Learn for arbitrary 3rd-party plug-ins, UC1 Channel Strip + Bus Comp encoder sections with GR/VU meters, fader motor + touch, 8 persistent parameter groups, bindings editor, Nav Mode overlay, and REC + RME TotalReaper integration.
After installing the extension via ReaPack, restart REAPER and open Preferences -> Control/OSC/Web -> Add -> Rea-Sixty. The first-run setup buttons (Windows WinUSB driver + Linux udev rule) are in Settings -> About; macOS needs no extra setup.

version.author: Frank Acklin
version.changelog: + Windows: libusb + hidapi now live in UserPlugins/ alongside reaper_rea-sixty.dll (delay-load + AddDllDirectory). No more manual placement next to reaper.exe. + Linux: udev rule installer button in Settings -> About (one pkexec prompt, same UX as the Windows WinUSB-installer). + ReaPack support for all three platforms.
